Daughter and co-heiress of Sir Edward Cherleton and Eleanor Holand, granddaughter of Sir John Cherelton and Joan de Stafford, Sir Thomas de Holand and Alice FitzAlan Arundel.

Wife of Sir John Tiptoft …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joyce Cherleton於1403年10月23日出生在英國史洛普爾萊可沃迪時，她的父親Sir Edward Cherleton32歲，母親Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton33歲。她於1422年2月28日與John Tibetot在英國武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1446年9月22日在英國米德萊可哈洛享年42歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joyce Cherleton于1403年10月23日出生在英国史洛普爾萊可沃迪时，她的父亲Sir Edward Cherleton32岁，母亲Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton33岁。她于1422年2月28日与John Tibetot在英国武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1446年9月22日在英国米德萊可哈洛享年42岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Cherleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Charlton
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): habitational name from North Charlton or Charlton near Bellingham (both Northumberland) or from any of the many other places so named (there are over ninety examples in England), from Old English Ceorlatūn ‘settlement (Old English tūn) of the peasants’. Old English ceorl denoted originally a free peasant of the lowest rank, later (but probably already before the Norman conquest) a tenant in pure villeinage, a serf or bondsman.

nameMeanings.name: Joyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently from the Norman male name Josce (Middle English Josse), which in turn is from Jodocus, a Latinized form of a Breton name, Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, borne by a 7th-century Breton saint. The name was in use in England among Breton followers of William the Conqueror. However, although this was fairly common as a male given name in the Middle Ages, it had virtually died out by the 14th century. There is evidence of its use as a girl's name from the 16th century onwards in parishes with strong Puritan links, which suggests that it may have been associated with the vocabulary word joy; see Joy . It was strongly revived in the 19th century under the influence of popular fiction. It is borne by characters in Mrs Henry Wood's East Lynne ( 1861 ) and Edna Lyall's In the Golden Days ( 1885 ). Modern use may well have been influenced also by the common Irish surname derived from the medieval Norman male name. See also Joss .

en.lifeSummary: When Joyce Cherleton was born on 23 October 1403, in Wrockwardine, Shropshire, England, her father, Sir Edward Cherleton, was 32 and her mother, Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton, was 33. She married John Tibetot on 28 February 1422, in Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 22 September 1446, in Harrow, Middlesex, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joyce Cherleton est née le 23 octobre 1403, à Wrockwardine, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edward Cherleton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé John Tibetot le 28 février 1422, à Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 septembre 1446, à Harrow, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joyce Cherleton am 23. Oktober 1403 in Wrockwardine, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edward Cherleton 32 und ihre Mutter Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton 33. Sie hat am 28. Februar 1422 in Worcestershire, England John Tibetot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. September 1446 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Harrow, Middlesex, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joyce Cherleton è nata il il 23 ottobre 1403 nel Wrockwardine, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Sir Edward Cherleton, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato John Tibetot il 28 febbraio 1422, nel Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 settembre 1446, nel Harrow, Middlesex, England, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joyce Cherletonが1403年10月23日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウロックワーディンで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Cherletonは32歳，母Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness cheretonは33歳であった。1422年2月28日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでJohn Tibetotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1446年9月22日にイギリスミッドレセックスハーローで42歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joyce Cherleton(이)가 1403년 10월 23일 영국 슈럽실르 록워딘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edward Cherleton(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1422년 2월 28일 영국 워스스터실르에서 John Tibetot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1446년 9월 22일 영국 미들레세스 해로에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.23 October 1403–22 September 1446: 23 de outubro de 1403–22 de setembro de 1446
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joyce Cherleton nasceu em 23 de outubro de 1403, em Wrockwardine, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edward Cherleton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com John Tibetot em 28 de fevereiro de 1422, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1446, em Harrow, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joyce Cherleton родилась 23 октября 1403 г. в местности рокквардаин, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Edward Cherleton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Tibetot 28 февраля 1422 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 22 сентября 1446 г. в местности харроу, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.23 October 1403–22 September 1446: 23 de octubre de 1403–22 de septiembre de 1446
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joyce Cherleton nació el 23 de octubre de 1403, en Wrockwardine, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edward Cherleton, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton, tenía 33 años. Se casó con John Tibetot el 28 de febrero de 1422, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1446, en Harrow, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en London, Inglaterra.
